title: Pressor family
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Pressor family''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] family who joined the [[Outbound Flight Project]]. They consisted of:
*[[Dillian Pressor]]<ref name="Outbound Flight">[[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']]</ref>
*[[Dillian Pressor's wife]]<ref name="Outbound Flight" />
**[[Jorad Pressor]], their son<ref name="Outbound Flight" />
**[[Katarin Pressor]], their daughter<ref name="Outbound Flight" />
**[[Rosemari Pressor Tabory]], their daughter<ref name="Survivor's Quest">''[[Survivor's Quest]]''</ref>
***[[Evlyn Tabory|Evlyn]], Rosemari's daughter<ref name="Survivor's Quest" />

==Family tree==
 [[Dillian Pressor]]<ref name="Outbound Flight" />--+--[[Dillian Pressor's wife]]<ref name="Outbound Flight" />
  |
   +--------------+-------------------+
   |  |   |
 [[Jorad Pressor]]<ref name="Outbound Flight" /> [[Katarin Pressor]]<ref name="Outbound Flight" /> [[Rosemari Pressor Tabory]]<ref name="Survivor's Quest" />--+--? Tabory
|
+
|
   [[Evlyn Tabory]]<ref name="Survivor's Quest" />

==Behind the scenes==
The novel ''[[Survivor's Quest]]'' gives the name of Jorad's sister as Rosemari.<ref name="Survivor's Quest" /> The novel [[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']] gives the name of Jorad's sister as Katarin.<ref name="Outbound Flight" /> Whether Rosemari is the same person as Katarin or is another sister born after the crash is unknown. However, ''Survivor's Quest'' implies that Rosemari was born after the crash.<ref name="Survivor's Quest" />

==Appearances==
*[[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']] {{Ab|Outbound Flight (unabridged audiobook)}}
*''[[Survivor's Quest]]'' {{Ab|Survivor's Quest (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
